subtitle: Review AI-proposed lore for under-described entities, then promote what you approve into this book's canon. Enriched drafts are private variants until you promote them.

compose.title: Create enrichment
compose.subtitle: Start enrichment your way — expand a draft you've written, or fill detected gaps. Everything you create is an enriched variant until you promote it.

draft.label: Your draft
draft.placeholder: Paste or write your draft for this entity. It will be expanded into the book's dimensions, in the book's voice…
draft.rewrite_hint: Rewrite + voice-sync to the book, preserving your meaning; fill all dimensions.
draft.add_only_hint: Keep your prose verbatim; only add the missing dimensions.

context.label: Reference text
context.placeholder: Paste reference text about this entity. It's ingested as grounding and the enrichment is generated from it (in the book's voice).
context.copyrighted_warning: Copyrighted material can't be ingested. Use public-domain, licensed, or your own text.
context.responsibility: You are responsible for the rights to this text. Not legal advice.

files.dropzone: Drop files here or click to browse
files.responsibility: I have the rights to these files (own / licensed / public-domain). Not legal advice.

intent.label: What do you want to create?
intent.placeholder: Describe it in your own words — e.g. "the wise advisor who helps the king found the dynasty".
intent.resolve_hint: Proposes a target below — review & edit it, then Run.

target.name: Name
target.existing_hint: Enriches the existing glossary entity with this name.
target.new_hint: Creates a new entity — nothing is written to your glossary until you promote the proposal.

config.eval_gate_warning: P2/P3 needs a passed eval-gate — the job is refused until it passes.

compose.safety: ① license · ② abstract · ③ regurgitation guard · ④ you promote — enriched stays a variant until you promote it.
compose.run_hint: Runs as a background job — the proposal appears under Proposals when ready.
compose.enqueued: Enrichment started — the proposal will appear under Proposals.

h0.tooltip: An enriched variant — never authored canon until you promote it.

verify.clean: Verified clean — no contradiction, anachronism, injection, or regurgitation found.
verify.degraded: Verification degraded — canon was unavailable, so contradiction couldn't be fully checked.

prov.recook_abstracted: Re-cooked from abstracted facts — generated from neutral fact bullets, not source prose (②).

detail.h0_note: This is an enriched variant (origin=enrichment, confidence<1.0). It becomes canon only when you promote it.
detail.h0_banner: This is an enriched variant — not the original canon. It becomes canon only when you promote it.

proposals.error: Couldn't load proposals. Please try again.

empty.title: No proposals yet
empty.description: Detect gaps and auto-enrich to generate proposals for this book.

actions.retract_confirm_desc: This removes the enriched supplement from this book's canon. The original entity is preserved — you can re-promote later.
actions.author_only: Only the book's author can review and promote enrichment.

promote.title: Promote to canon
promote.h0: This enriched variant will become authored canon for this book. The permanent origin marker is kept, so it stays traceable as originally enriched.
promote.responsibility: By promoting, you adopt this content as the author and confirm you hold the rights to the sources it was built from. Not legal advice.

gaps.title: Gaps
gaps.subtitle: Under-described entities in this book's glossary, ranked by importance. Detect, then auto-enrich chosen gaps as a background job.
gaps.detect_hint: Click "Detect gaps" to scan this book's glossary coverage.
gaps.none: No gaps detected — every entity is well described.
gaps.extract_first: No entities yet — extract this book first (Knowledge tab). Enrichment fills gaps in entities the platform already knows about.
gaps.gate_note: P2 fabrication / P3 recook require the eval gate to pass (diverse judges).
gaps.enrich_one_hint: Select generation + embedding models below to enrich.

sources.title: Sources
sources.subtitle: License-tagged corpus for retrieval / recook.
sources.name: Name
sources.ingest_placeholder: Paste public-domain / licensed source text to chunk + embed…
sources.default_deny: Default-deny: only public-domain / licensed sources may be recooked. You are responsible for the license of sources you register.

ground.title: Ground from chapters
ground.subtitle: Pick specific chapters to embed as a grounding corpus — raw prose beyond what knowledge RAG + glossary canon surface. The text is your own.
ground.no_chapters: This book has no chapters yet.
ground.showing: Showing the first {{shown}} of {{total}} chapters — the primary grounding path (knowledge RAG) already covers all chapters; this is for deliberate extra selection.

settings.title: Enrichment profile
settings.subtitle: The per-book worldview that de-biases generation — language, era, voice, and the dimensions enrichment fills. Edits apply to new jobs.
settings.error: Couldn't load the profile. Please try again.
settings.era_hint: An era/anachronism constraint, e.g. "no post-Shang-Zhou tech". Empty = anachronism check off.
settings.markers_hint: One per line as "term | reason". These are the terms the anachronism check flags. Clearing them turns the check off.
settings.no_extra_dims: Uses the built-in dimensions for this kind.
settings.suggest_hint: AI reads the book metadata + chapters to propose a draft you can edit. Nothing is saved until you Save.
